positive_contracts_covered: deterministic PCM16 event-to-mixdown production with stable bytes and event ordering
1-16 channel deterministic mono downmix with one explicit shared sample rate
exact source hash, byte, PCM metadata, sample-window, and AV timing binding
registry-defined gains, clipping rejection, transactional output, and final-path bindings
inline technical-proxy measurement disclosure and fail-closed pending proof artifacts
original Wave30 scorer acceptance of the produced mix with blocked proof and loudness gates
scorer cross-checks clipping, true-peak, and integrated-loudness gate assertions
negative_contracts_covered: source hash drift, mixed sample rates, clipping, certified input, and short-event timing drift
existing output preservation on failed publication
unknown taxonomy, invalid ownership, artifact or AV binding drift, and missing lanes
runtime or review proof spoofing and synthetic promotion
